name: Guard
rules_text: Reduce incoming damage by Guard Value, then decrement one stack at end of owner turn.

name: Fortify
rules_text: Incoming control effects have reduced potency while active.

name: Expose
rules_text: Increase incoming damage by Exposed Value.

name: Stagger
rules_text: Unit cannot play power cards this turn.

name: Bleed
rules_text: Take fixed damage at end of turn per stack.

name: Burn
rules_text: Take fixed damage at end of turn; burns remove one Guard stack before damage.

name: Overheat
rules_text: At threshold, reduce AP max by 1 until stacks drop below threshold.

name: Mark
rules_text: Marked target receives bonus effects from mark-synergy cards.

name: Root
rules_text: Unit cannot reposition via mobility cards.

name: Silence
rules_text: Unit cannot play utility or control card categories.

name: Veil
rules_text: First incoming hostile card this turn loses bonus riders.

name: Taunt
rules_text: Unit must target taunt source when possible.

name: Vulnerable
rules_text: Increase final damage multiplier by fixed step per stack.

name: Regeneration
rules_text: Recover fixed HP at start of turn per stack.

name: Shielded
rules_text: Gain shield temp pool that is consumed before HP.
